must_detect.matched_text:
Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Platypode Systems Pty Ltd (ABN 00 000 000 000) by Eucalypta Group Limited (ASX code: TBDX).
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 100% of the issued shares; consideration to be a mix of cash and scrip subject to the Corporations Act and ASX Listing Rules; no MNPI beyond the Buyer’s ASX announcement dated 2025-03-04.
Conditions precedent: any required ASIC relief and ASX waivers, Target and Buyer shareholder approvals, no prohibition under the Competition and Consumer Act; FIRB approval not expected but included as a fallback condition.
Data protection: Parties will adopt Schedule 3 (DPA) and APP-compliant onboarding forms; collection is limited to role emails and business contact data only (data minimisation).
Data Export Approval (intentional positive): approved cross-border transfer of de-identified employee training metrics to Aotearoa Analytics Limited (New Zealand) under Schedule 3 (DPA) on 2025-02-14; APP 8 due diligence and transfer impact assessment completed.
Privacy status: no outstanding consent withdrawal, DSAR, or erasure requests as at the date of this term sheet; prior DSARs were completed and logged with an OAIC-compliant audit trail.
Retention: Target maintains records per Retention Policy RP-PLAT-2024 with defined retention and secure destruction windows; finance and payroll records are retained for statutory periods and not deleted early.
Data room scope: redacted employment files, WHS incident summaries, and supplier credit terms are provided; BSB and account numbers are masked (e.g., BSB 000-000, Acct ****0000); no TFNs or Medicare numbers are held or displayed.
Compliance representations: Target complies with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and ASIC guidance on handling of MNPI; there are no unresolved APP breach notifications; Spam Act and CDR obligations are assessed as not triggered by the Target’s operations.
Employment integration: on completion, employees will receive new letters consistent with the National Employment Standards; no new sensitive health information will be collected except fitness-for-work certificates where lawful and necessary.
Announcements: any ASX disclosure will be coordinated by the Buyer’s company secretary; this document contains no inside information and relies on publicly available materials.
Confidentiality and access: access to the data room is limited to approved roles; queries via legal@eucalypta.example; no personal contact details are included in deal materials.
Financing: Buyer to arrange domestic debt facilities; supplier credit applications in the data room exclude consumer credit reports; closing conditioned on a solvency certificate and no MAC.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
